voices.name: Dawit Teshome
voices.description: Young male with an American accent is best for Narration

voices.name: Tom
voices.description: A warm, accessible voice with a natural Southern UK cadence - authentic British English without being formal. Conversational yet clear, ideal for AI agents, podcasts, and interactive voice applications. Friendly and grounded in tone, perfect for engaging, trust-building dialogue and dynamic, everyday listening experiences.

voices.name: VWST - Professional neutral voice
voices.description: Clear and crisp, grave Baritone voice - perfect for Narration, Audiobook and generalist applications.

voices.name: Prashant V – Humanlike Conversational Tamil Voice for AI Chatbots & Virtual Helpdesks
voices.description:
Prashant V’s voice brings a calm, friendly tone that feels just like chatting with someone you know—perfect for Tamil-language bots, utilities, and AI apps.

His clear and conversational style makes him a great fit for smart assistants, daily interaction bots, mobile utilities, and IVR flows that aim for a more human touch.

Ideal for use in regional tech apps, telecom utilities like Airtel Thanks or Jio, or payment services like PhonePe and Google Pay in Tamil.

voices.name: Yaman
voices.description: Clean Deep Storyteller Voice.

voices.name: Erik
voices.description: This is the warm, resonant, and authentically Hispanic voice of a 35-year-old Mexican. He combines a friendly and approachable tone with a clarity that inspires confidence. It's a voice that conveys relatability, perfect for telling stories, giving instructions, or creating content that connects authentically with the Latino community. Ideal for those looking for a familiar, genuine, and charismatic sound. In short, a voice that can go viral for its warmth and unmistakable personal touch.

voices.name: Educational Eric - Informative & Engaging
voices.description: Ready to entertain your audience while teaching them something new and engaging? Eric is here to make learning fun, easy and memorable. A kind voice with dynamic inquisitive wonder and a light touch. Perfect for socials, narrative and whatever else you imagine. Professional studio quality recorded with a high end microphone into a Neve desk.

voices.name: McDonald - American Storyteller
voices.description: A Casual Middle-Aged Male Voice, Perfect for Daily Conversations, Social Media, Podcasting, and Storytelling.

voices.name: Jethran
voices.description: An American Southern Male narrator.

voices.name: JB
voices.description: Middle-aged male voice. Works well for Informative video.

voices.name: Aman - Hinglish Indian Tone
voices.description: Hinglish-Indian young male voice.

voices.name: Jimmy - Softly Enthusiastic
voices.description: Softly spoken, British male voice.

voices.name: Arthur
voices.description: This voice belongs to a 37-year-old man with a distinctive, radio-friendly tone. Rich, deep, and full of character, it grabs your attention from the very first sentence. Perfect for narration, podcasts, commercials, and dubbing, where authenticity and power of delivery are key. You can hear experience, confidence, and warmth in it, which inspires trust. It works perfectly in both professional productions and more emotional formats. It is a voice that not only speaks – it tells a story.

voices.name: Anton
voices.description: Warm Male Ukrainian baritone with crystal-clear diction and a gentle Slavic undertone. With years of broadcast and voiceover experience, Anton brings dynamic range and emotive depth to every project. His precise  natural warmth inspire trust and engagement—ideal for commercials, documentaries, narration, and eLearning.

voices.name: Vincent - Voice Actor
voices.description: Clear and crisp male voice geared for multi-purpose applications.

voices.name: Brad
voices.description:
Confident. Calm. Commanding.

This voice carries the quiet authority of someone who knows exactly what they’re doing — and gets results. Smooth, grounded, and effortlessly persuasive, it’s the kind of voice you trust in high-stakes conversations and lean into during moments of doubt.

voices.name: Navya Kannan
voices.description: An Indian Female voice perfect for narration, and news.

voices.name: Ryszard – Warm Confident Polish Customer Care Agent
voices.description:
Ryszard’s voice combines warmth, clarity, and confidence.

With a friendly yet professional Polish tone, he’s ideal for handling queries, guiding users, and providing a reassuring experience.

This voice is great for use in banking support systems (like PKO Bank Polski or ING Bank Śląski), telecom helpdesks (e.g., Orange Polska, Play), and e-commerce platforms like Allegro, as well as AI-based bots and IVR flows requiring a human-like touch.

voices.name: ⁠Pascal R – Suspenseful Calm German Narrator Voice
voices.description:
Pascal R’s voice is deep, steady, and composed—perfect for building tension with a calm yet gripping presence. His German delivery carries authority and subtle intensity, making him ideal for thrillers, mysteries, and serious storytelling where suspense must unfold at a deliberate pace.

This profile is well-suited for German audiobooks on Audible, suspense podcasts on Spotify, crime narration on YouTube, and AI voice companions for mystery and documentary formats.

voices.name: Hamza - Standard Arabic
voices.description: A Professional Middle-Aged Male Voice, Perfect for Documentary, Voice Over, Podcasting, Social Media Ads, and Storytelling.

voices.name: Pooja - Emotional Caring Voice for Theraphy & Empathtetic bots
voices.description:
Pooja’s voice is soft, emotionally grounded, and deeply caring—ideal for mental health support, empathetic AI bots, and virtual therapy assistants. 

This voice is designed for platforms focusing on emotional well-being, therapy, and mindfulness, such as Wysa, InnerHour, MindPeers, Calm, and Headspace. Whether you’re building a mental health companion, guided journaling bot, or supportive check-in system, Pooja’s presence brings calm and care to every interaction.

voices.name: Rich Storytelling Male Voice
voices.description: Fully merge yourself in this storytelling in a rich voice, perfect for setting up the perfect scene in your tale!

voices.name: Peter K
voices.description: Bulgarian, middle-aged man with a slight hoarseness in his thick voice. Good for Bulgarian, English, Spanish, and German voiceovers.

voices.name: ilyass - Pro Audiobook
voices.description: A calm and elegant voice, ideal for audiobook narration and storytelling. Its delivery is smooth, professional, and emotionally balanced—perfect for conveying peaceful, thoughtful content with clarity and warmth.

voices.name: Keith Muoki
voices.description: Male, 30s to early 40s; East African English with a mild Kenyan coastal lilt; warm baritone with chesty resonance, smooth low mids, crisp consonants. Calm, grounded authority with compassionate coach energy. Measured, conversational pace with intentional pauses. Motivational cadence that lifts on questions and resolves firmly on key lines. Emotionally steady, wise, reassuring, never preachy. Minimal filler; clear T, D, K articulation; gentle breath, low sibilance.

voices.name: Madhulika_Zyra
voices.description: Indian voice

voices.name: Simran – Young Support Bot Voice for Banks & NBFCs
voices.description:
Simran’s voice is warm, youthful, and naturally clear—ideal for support interactions that require both friendliness and reliability.



Simran is the real-life partner of Viraj, another top voice on ElevenLabs with over a billion characters generated, both come from a customer support background.

This voice is optimized for use across private banks like HDFC, ICICI, IDFC etc as well as prominent NBFCs such as Bajaj Finance, Muthoot Finance, HDB Financial, Aditya Birla Finance, and Tata Capital.

voices.name: Viraj - Bold & Commanding Recovery Agent for Banks & NBFCs
voices.description:
This voice is designed for urgency, escalation, and situations where polite reminders no longer work. 

Viraj delivers a blunt, firm, and emotionally detached tone—built for high-pressure recovery situations. As one of ElevenLabs’ most popular voices, his other profiles have crossed over 1 billion characters.

This version is fine-tuned for final-stage EMI reminders, debt recovery calls, and escalation flows suitable for platforms like Bajaj Finserv, KreditBee, Paytm, LazyPay etc.

voices.name: Trupti - Warm & Romantic Storyteller for Late Night Narration
voices.description:
Trupti’s voice blends warmth and intimacy with a confident, steady tone—perfect for connecting with listeners during reflective, late-night hours.

Her delivery is both personal and grounded, offering a companion-like presence for deep, emotional or romantic narratives.

Ideal for late-night storytelling podcasts, guided reflections on Spotify, romantic fiction on Audible, Calm app monologues, and AI companions that aim to build trust through soft-yet-assured narration.

voices.name: Ruben - French Natural Young & Deep
voices.description: Deep French male voice with a youthful and warm timbre. Naturally poised, confident, and engaging, it's perfect for captivating an audience through immersive storytelling, audiobooks, documentaries, or podcasts.
